---
title: "scRNA Annotation Method Report: scDeepSort"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

import pandas as pd

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from report_utils import format_table, load_report_context, package_versions_table

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
context = load_report_context(ROOT)
```

## Status

This report file is reserved for a future Python-native `scDeepSort` backend.

`scDeepSort` is not yet executed by the template runtime. The report exists as a
scaffold so the method-specific documentation and diagnostics have a dedicated
place once the backend is added.

```{python}
status_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "method", "value": "scdeepsort"},
        {"field": "implemented_in_runtime", "value": "no"},
        {"field": "intended_role", "value": "pretrained deep-learning annotation in supported species/settings"},
        {"field": "current_selected_methods", "value": ", ".join(context["selected_methods"])},
    ]
)
format_table(status_df)
```

## Planned Inputs

```{python}
planned_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"input": "species", "purpose": "select the supported organism"},
        {"input": "supported tissue/model", "purpose": "pick a compatible pretrained model"},
        {"input": "gene symbol compatibility", "purpose": "align the query matrix to model expectations"},
        {"input": "runtime environment", "purpose": "manage older dependency constraints explicitly"},
    ]
)
format_table(planned_df)
```

## Planned Diagnostics

```{python}
diagnostics_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"diagnostic": "predicted label distribution", "why_it_matters": "catch implausible class imbalance"},
        {"diagnostic": "cluster agreement", "why_it_matters": "review consistency with unsupervised structure"},
        {"diagnostic": "low-confidence cells", "why_it_matters": "avoid overconfident final labels"},
        {"diagnostic": "environment summary", "why_it_matters": "document compatibility-sensitive runs"},
    ]
)
format_table(diagnostics_df)
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_df = package_versions_table(["scanpy", "anndata", "pandas", "numpy", "plotly", "scdeepsort"])
format_table(session_df)
```
